rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(166, 128, 184)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 168px; height: 1px; padding-top: 25px; margin-left: 331px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
